title: Configuring each kubelet in your cluster using kubeadm — Configure kubelets using kubeadm
text:
It is possible to configure the kubelet that kubeadm will start if a custom
KubeletConfiguration
API object is passed with a configuration file like so
kubeadm ... --config some-config-file.yaml
.
By calling
kubeadm config print init-defaults --component-configs KubeletConfiguration
you can
see all the default values for this structure.
It is also possible to apply instance-specific patches over the base
KubeletConfiguration
.
Have a look at
Customizing the kubelet
for more details.
